data.description:
rebar still uses the Claude-Code plugin home .claude/ as its writable state root: ticket-scratch-set.sh:21 / -get / -clear:50 default base REPO_ROOT/.claude/scratch (+ ticket-lib.sh:1694-1820 helpers, ticket-show.sh:166 fallback read), and migration stamp files .claude/.{closure-checks,file-impact}-migration-v1 (ticket-migrate-closure-checks-v1.sh:65, ticket-migrate-file-impact-v1.sh:66). rebar's own config root is .rebar/ (read-config.sh). The scratch subcommand silently litters .claude/scratch in any host repo.

Work (TDD; behavior-visible, land in the breaking window): default scratch base -> .rebar/scratch (keep SCRATCH_BASE_DIR override); migration stamps -> .rebar/. Update asserting tests: test-ticket-migrate-closure-checks-v1.sh:254,272,371,428; test-ticket-migrate-file-impact-v1.sh:185,237; scratch tests.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No rebar code writes under .claude/ (git grep '\.claude' src/ clean)
- [ ] SCRATCH_BASE_DIR override still honored; docs mention the new default
- [ ] Old-path fallback NOT added (clean break, per audit decision); change noted in release notes
- [ ] Full suite green
data.title: Move rebar writable state out of .claude/ (scratch base + migration stamps) to .rebar/
